goal: Add a --dry-run flag to scripts/persistent-solve.py: when set, only run planning (recursive or flat) and print the kanban tree, then exit without executing any tasks. Wire it through main() -> persistent_solve() -> _run_dag_mode(). After planning, build KanbanState, print tree, save JSON, return early.

tree.description: Verify that the --dry-run flag is fully wired and functional by running it end-to-end with both flat and recursive modes
Ensure --dry-run always enables kanban output even without explicit --kanban flag, so the tree is always printed
Add a unit test verifying dry-run mode plans but does not execute tasks
